entity.summary: Polygon automated-market-maker exchange and yield-farming protocol with residual liquidity and historical trading activity but no recent recorded DEX volume.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves AuraSwap as a Polygon AMM and reports residual TVL and cumulative exchange volume. However, 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day DEX volume are zero. No verified shutdown announcement was recovered, so HEI uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass.

evidence.title: AuraSwap protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies AuraSwap as a Polygon AMM and yield-farming exchange.

evidence.title: AuraSwap DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the AuraSwap identity and Polygon chain association.

evidence.title: AuraSwap protocol data endpoint
evidence.notes: Residual TVL remains, but all recent DEX-volume windows are zero, supporting a limited classification.
